name: Oven Barbecued Caribou Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the caribou ribs in a large oven-proof dish.
2. Brush the ribs lightly with cooking oil.
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the ribs.
4. Bake at 325-350 degrees Fahrenheit until the ribs are fairly well done, turning them once.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (tomato sauce, vinegar, prepared mustard, and Louisiana Hot Sauce).
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the ribs.
7. Continue baking until the ribs are done, basting occasionally with the sauce.
